messages.author: North Western Bear
messages.text: New to meshing in general, setup a few nodes tonight, one repeater mounted up as high as I can physically put it on my house given my available ladder. Currently it's just using the antenna included with the solar repeater kit, but plan on upgrading in the next couple weeks. Currently from my testing that devices coverage is spotty throughout Wasilla, but Wasilla Carrs area and parts of Seward Meridian and Bogard have coverage for now. Hope to see more people joining up!
